hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read file_path; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|md|mdx)$'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx prettier --write "$file_path" 2>/dev/null && echo "✨ Formatted: $file_path" >&2; fi; } || true
osascript -e 'display notification "任务已完成 ✨" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' && echo '✨ 任务完成！' >&2 || echo '✨ 任务完成！' >&2
